title: Nightly FalkorDB dump to S3-compatible storage
userStory: As an operator, I want a nightly off-VPS backup of the graph so that a host loss does not lose the brain.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage choice picked and documented (default: Cloudflare R2 for free egress; Backblaze B2 acceptable)
New file compose/backup/falkordb-backup.sh runs: BGSAVE -> wait for LASTSAVE timestamp change -> docker compose cp dump.rdb to /tmp -> rclone copy to remote bucket -> rm local
Retention rotation: keep 7 daily, 4 weekly, 12 monthly
Verify: trigger the script manually; remote bucket gets a new dump; rotation removes the oldest beyond policy
